channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Egypt vs Iran at World Cup 2026 – Salah, prediction, lineups, how to watch
item.description: Mohamed Salah's Egypt and Mehdi Taremi's Iran are both in the hunt for the FIFA World Cup knockouts in Group G.

item.title: Can Europe’s historic cities survive a warming climate?
item.description: Heatwaves are forcing the continent to choose between preserving the past and adapting for the future.

item.title: IAEA demands verification of Iran nuclear ambitions amid ‘statement war’
item.description: Watchdog's call for 'strong system' comes as US and Iran issue conflicting claims over ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: Who has profited most from the war on Iran?
item.description: Defence contractors, energy companies and investment banks saw profits soar as war and uncertainty upended markets.

item.title: Baby pulled alive from rubble after Venezuela earthquake
item.description: Baby pulled alive from rubble after Venezuela earthquake

item.title: Russia reports downing 660 Ukrainian drones, denies seeking Belarus war aid
item.description: The drone attack is one of Kyiv's biggest of the war, sustaining pressure on Russia as it struggles with fuel shortages.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Friday schedule, predictions, standings, knockout race
item.description: World Cup knockout places are on the line as Groups G, H and I conclude, with fixtures, predictions, and standings.

item.title: Mother gives birth amid Venezuela earthquake devastation
item.description: Mother gives birth amid Venezuela earthquake devastation

item.title: Venezuela earthquakes: Why is Caracas so vulnerable?
item.description: Inadequate infrastructure in Caracas due to underfunding intensified destruction from the tremors.

item.title: ‘London cooking’: Why can’t the UK cope with the heat; when will it adapt?
item.description: A nation used to cold, rainy weather is starting to discuss the value of overhauling its systems.

item.title: ‘Affordability crisis’: How the Western housing crisis spiralled
item.description: Rising rents and prices outpacing wages provoke global debate: Is housing a basic right or an investment asset?

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 15: Netherlands, Australia advance; Curacao eliminated
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: North Korea conducts major weapons tests; South training ‘drone warriors’
item.description: Kim Jong Un demands a 'deadly and destructive offensive posture' as North Korea upgrades arsenal to reach all of South.

item.title: Driver plows through Mexico World Cup crowd
item.description: Driver plows through Mexico World Cup crowd

item.title: World aids rescue effort as Venezuela quake death toll hits 235
item.description: Rescuers and humanitarian aid are flooding in from across the Americas as hospitals fill up with patients.

item.title: Iran war day 119: Israel hits Lebanon as IAEA says it will return to Iran
item.description: Israeli and Lebanese delegations will continue their talks on Friday.

item.title: US ends deportation protections (TPS) for Haitians and Syrians
item.description: The US Supreme Court has sided with the Trump administration in its bid to end Temporary Protected Status (TPS).

item.title: Turkiye beat US with stoppage-time goal in World Cup dead rubber
item.description: Kaan Ayhan scored the winner late in stoppage time as Turkiye handed the US their first defeat of 2026 FIFA World Cup.

item.title: Which teams have qualified for the World Cup 2026 knockouts, round of 32?
item.description: The 2026 FIFA World Cup knockout stage format, criteria and rules for qualification. Find out who's in and who's out.

item.title: Apple, Microsoft hike prices over surging chip costs
item.description: Tech giants roll out steep price increases amid shortage of memory chips used to power AI.

item.title: Australia reach World Cup knockouts after gritty draw with Paraguay
item.description: The Socceroos finish second in Group D with four points and are through to the 2026 FIFA World Cup round of 32.

item.title: Egypt coach offers support for Iranian team before crucial World Cup match
item.description: Hossam Hassan invokes FIFA's 'respect and fair play' rules amid US restrictions on Iran, whom Egypt face in Seattle.

item.title: Satellite images show Venezuela’s La Guaira before and after twin quakes
item.description: Satellite images compare Venezuela's coastal city of La Guaira before and after twin earthquakes struck.

item.title: Forever wars: Israel’s cycle of conflict shows no finish line
item.description: Despite ceasefires and shifting military fronts, Israel’s wars continue, with no clear end or lasting security gains.

item.title: Oil prices ease after spiking over halt to Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan
item.description: Brent crude subsides after attack in waterway prompted jump in prices.
